stories.headline: Kylie Jenner former chef sues, alleges workload led to miscarriage - USA Today
stories.summary: Kylie Jenner is facing third lawsuit over workplace conditions by a former chef alleging the job caused her to have a miscarriage.

stories.headline: ‘Dutton Ranch’ stars Cole Hauser and Kelly Reilly react to showrunner’s abrupt exit - Page Six
stories.summary: “Showrunners change all the time,” Cole Hauser said. “This business is about adapting. We’ve been doing this for a long time. Things change. People move on.”

stories.headline: King Charles reveals he paid £12.9m in tax for 2024-25 - BBC
stories.summary: The King becomes first monarch to publish their tax payments - with the figures putting him among the UK's top 100 taxpayers.

stories.headline: Dolly Parton, 80, Leaves Fans Concerned After Latest Public Appearance - Yahoo
stories.summary: Dolly Parton is sparking concern after a shaky public appearance left fans worried about her health. The 80-year-old country icon stepped out Wednesday, June...

stories.headline: Tom Sandoval's girlfriend Victoria Robinson arrested for alleged attack that left Bravo star bloody, bruised - Page Six
stories.summary: The “Vanderpump Rules” star now has a restraining order against his girlfriend after she allegedly brutally attacked him.

stories.headline: ‘House Of The Dragon’ Season 3 Premiere Tames 21M Viewers In 3 Days, Down 8% From Season 2 - Deadline
stories.summary: House of the Dragon has returned, and so far the Season 3 audience is roughly on par with its predecessor.

stories.headline: ‘Jersey Shore’ star Jenni ‘JWoww’ Farley snubs 2 ‘blindsided’ co-stars from surprise wedding: report - Page Six
stories.summary: Farley’s co-stars are reportedly “extremely upset and hurt” by being left off the guest list.
